content: Fullscreen API: element.requestFullscreen() — must be called from user event handler — returns Promise. document.exitFullscreen() to exit. document.fullscreenElement is non-null when in fullscreen. Listen for fullscreenchange event to detect enter/exit. document.fullscreenEnabled check before calling. CSS :fullscreen pseudo-class for styling. Mobile: some browsers ignore viewport meta in fullscreen, pinch-to-zoom may not work. Chrome/Firefox/Safari/Edge all supported.
